responsibilities: Build merger models and synergy analyses to evaluate the financial impact of potential acquisitions and divestitures
Conduct valuation analysis using DCF, comparable company, and precedent transaction methodologies to inform deal pricing
Coordinate due diligence workstreams across finance, legal, and operational teams during active M&A transactions
Screen and evaluate potential acquisition targets based on strategic fit, financial performance, and valuation attractiveness
Prepare board-level presentations summarizing deal rationale, valuation, and financial impact of proposed transactions
Support post-merger integration planning by identifying synergy capture opportunities and tracking integration milestones
Analyze target company financial statements to identify risks, opportunities, and key value drivers ahead of negotiations
Monitor industry M&A activity and competitive transactions to inform corporate development strategy and target pipeline
